title: uv as the Python Lockfile Floor
one_liner: Standardize Python projects on uv with committed uv.lock; agents always invoke commands via uv run.

title: pyproject.toml as the Single Source of Configuration
one_liner: Concentrate every Python tool's config in pyproject.toml; forbid setup.cfg, tox.ini, .flake8, pytest.ini.

title: TypeScript Strict + isolatedDeclarations + Project References
one_liner: Enable strict, noUncheckedIndexedAccess, exactOptionalPropertyTypes; libraries add isolatedDeclarations + composite refs.

title: pnpm Workspaces with Dependency Catalogs
one_liner: Use pnpm catalog: protocol for shared external deps and workspace:* for internal links to eliminate version drift.

title: Go to TypeScript DTO Contract via tygo
one_liner: Generate TS types from Go DTOs via tygo; commit output and fail CI on diff or any 'any'.

title: PHP Dual Gate: PHPStan Level 9 + Psalm Taint
one_liner: Run PHPStan level 9 plus Psalm taint analysis; both green required for merge, no mixed types or unsuppressed taint.

title: Mutation Testing as the Agent Feedback Signal
one_liner: Replace coverage gates with diff-scoped mutation testing and feed surviving mutants back to the agent until the score clears the threshold.

title: Property-Based Tests From LLM-Inferred Invariants
one_liner: Force agents to write properties from a closed five-class rubric, each grounded in a quoted docstring or type, before example tests.

title: Ruby Sorbet Strict Floor with Tapioca RBI
one_liner: Require typed:true minimum and Tapioca-generated RBIs; srb tc plus tapioca check-shims block the PR.

title: C# Roslyn Analyzers as Compile Errors + Public API Lock
one_liner: Escalate LLM bug-class analyzers to error severity and pin public surface via PublicApiAnalyzers shipped/unshipped files.

title: Swift Architecture as Tests via Harmonize + Swift Testing
one_liner: Encode layer and import rules as Harmonize @Test cases; swift-format plus SwiftLint plus swift test form the agent floor.

title: JVM One-Tag Release via JReleaser
one_liner: Drive JVM releases from a single git tag through jreleaser.yml to Sonatype Central Portal plus GitHub Release.

title: TDD with Red and Green in Separate Agents
one_liner: Split RED and GREEN into sub-agents with disjoint tool permissions; orchestrator asserts a real RED to GREEN transition before commit.

title: Self-Healing Locators with Mandatory Audit Diff
one_liner: Allow E2E selector self-healing only when role+accessible-name match; every heal lands as a reviewable diff before the next CI run consumes it.

title: Agent Drafts Spec Comment Before Any Diff
one_liner: On ticket assignment the agent posts a structured current/desired/plan comment and blocks until a non-bot approval signal clears the gate.

title: Error-Tracker to Draft-PR Pipeline
one_liner: On a thresholded production exception, dispatch a coding agent to open a draft PR with a patch and regression test bidirectionally linked to the alert.

title: Runbook-as-Markdown with Agent Step Tags
one_liner: Author runbooks as Markdown with a fixed spine; tag each remediate step agent:auto or agent:approval; agent refuses untagged steps.

title: Tool-Tier Approval Gate (T0/T1/T2)
one_liner: Classify tools into T0 read-only, T1 audited mutation, T2 destructive; enforce at executor; T2 requires signed bound JWT approval.

title: Read-Only Investigation Mode by Default
one_liner: Boot SRE agent with readonly RBAC only; remediate role binds via /agent escalate-trust + MFA, TTL-capped, auto-revoked on close.

title: Postmortem Auto-Draft, Never Auto-Publish
one_liner: Agent drafts blameless postmortem with cited timeline and (hypothesis) tags; lands as draft; human owns root cause and publish.

title: Spec-Kit Three-Step Pipeline (specify -> plan -> tasks)
one_liner: Run /speckit.specify -> /speckit.plan -> /speckit.tasks before any code; the spec, not code, is the source of truth.

title: Plan Mode Then Locked Execution
one_liner: Enter Plan Mode (read-only) for >3-file changes, get approval, execute literally; deviations require a new plan.

title: One Task -> One Branch -> One Worktree -> One Agent (with Runtime Isolation)
one_liner: Each parallel agent gets its own worktree, branch, scope manifest, AND port/DB/cache/secret sandbox.

title: agent-fixable Triage Gate (Humans Pick, Agents Work)
one_liner: Coding agents listen only for the agent-fixable label-add; agents may not self-label; raises merge rate from ~34% to ~67%.

title: CodeQL + Copilot Autofix as the PR-time SAST Gate
one_liner: Make CodeQL a required PR check and treat Copilot Autofix patches as reviewable suggestions, never auto-merge.

title: Two-Layer Secret Scanning: Gitleaks + Verified TruffleHog
one_liner: Run gitleaks pre-commit and verified-only TruffleHog in CI; rotate at the issuer before any history rewrite.

title: Trivy with Pinned-Version Supply-Chain Scan + SBOM
one_liner: SHA-pin the Trivy action, run fs+image gate on every PR, and emit a signed CycloneDX SBOM on every release tag.

title: SonarQube AI Code Quality Gate
one_liner: Bind repos to the Qualified-for-AI-Code-Assurance quality gate and let the agent loop on Sonar findings via MCP until the gate is green.

title: Conventional Commits Enforced at the Hook
one_liner: Reject non-conformant commit messages at the commit-msg hook and CI PR-title check, and derive CHANGELOG plus semver from the log.

title: License Compliance as a Build-Blocking Gate
one_liner: Run licensee or FOSSA against an SPDX allow/flag/deny policy on every PR and emit a signed CycloneDX SBOM per release.

title: Human Approval as a Signed Scoped Single-Use JWT
one_liner: Replace Slack thumbs-up approval with a short-lived JWT bound to tool, target, args-hash, and incident, verified at each tool call.

title: Graph-Indexed vs Diff-Only AI Reviewers
one_liner: Pick reviewer architecture by repo properties (LOC, polyglot, module-isolation, latency target) instead of vendor preference.

title: Codemod-First Refactor Agent
one_liner: Run AST codemod for the deterministic 95%, LLM for the 5% tail; one PR per logical group; CI asserts codemod idempotence.

title: Slash-Command Surface for PR Review Bots
one_liner: Auto-trigger /describe and /review on PR open and push; keep /improve opt-in; isolate bot output behind HTML comments so re-runs never clobber human edits.

title: Renovate Auto-Merge + AI Handoff for Breaking Updates
one_liner: Renovate auto-merges semver-safe patch and minor bumps; major bumps and vulnerability alerts label `agent-fixable` and hand off to a coding agent.

title: Linear Agent as First-Class Assignee
one_liner: Treat AI agents as Linear assignees with their own identity, posting checkpoint comments and PR links via MCP-bounded scope.

title: Consumer Contract Tests Generated from OpenAPI / Traffic
one_liner: Generate Pact contracts via MCP from OpenAPI/traffic, never hand-write; gate provider deploys on can-i-deploy.

title: Golden-Master Corpus for AI-Driven Legacy Rewrites
one_liner: Capture normalized (input,output) pairs from legacy as the spec; rewrite passes only on byte-for-byte parity, with row-by-row approval for diffs.

title: Pre-Commit Hooks as the Non-Negotiable Merge Floor
one_liner: Every code repo registers a pre-commit framework that blocks format/lint/secret/type failures; agents fix root cause, never bypass with --no-verify.

title: Ruff for Python and Biome for JS/TS as the Sole Linter+Formatter
one_liner: Adopt ruff for Python and biome for JS/TS as the only linter+formatter; remove black, flake8, isort, ESLint, Prettier configs.

title: MegaLinter as the Polyglot Quality Umbrella in CI
one_liner: Polyglot repos run MegaLinter in CI with a flavor matching the stack; never as a pre-commit hook to keep the local commit sub-second.

title: Autofix-vs-Flag Decision Rule for Coding Agents
one_liner: Agents auto-apply only purely-syntactic fixes that pass tests with diff under 50 lines or a single rule ID; SAST/secrets/CVEs/license/complexity always flag.

title: Jira via Atlassian Rovo MCP, Permission-Inheriting
one_liner: Route every Jira/Confluence/JSM agent action through Atlassian's Rovo MCP server with the assignee's OAuth grant and embed agents at workflow status transitions.

title: GitHub Copilot Workspace Four-Gate Pipeline
one_liner: Drive GitHub ticket-to-PR through Copilot Workspace's spec, plan, diff, PR gates with per-gate human approval and a CI-enforced Closes-N plus snapshot link.

title: AI Triage, Classify, and Route Inbound Issues
one_liner: Run inbound issues through a six-step triage agent (classify, severity+SLA, dedupe, label, route, assign) with a blocker-confirmation gate and a single transparency comment.

title: GitLab Duo Agent Platform Developer Flow
one_liner: Drive GitLab issue-to-MR transitions through named Duo flows (Developer chained into Code Review) with label triggers, project-permission inheritance, and a GitLab 18.8 floor.

title: AGENTS.md Context Pyramid (CLAUDE.md to AGENTS.md to .agents/INDEX.md)
one_liner: Three-tier per-directory context: CLAUDE.md hook plus 20-80 line AGENTS.md brief plus on-demand .agents/INDEX.md catalogue serves Claude Code and standalone agents alike.

title: Symbol Index as Always-Fresh LSP/ctags Artifact
one_liner: Commit a universal-ctags or LSP/SCIP symbol index, regenerate via pre-commit, gate drift in CI, and force agents to query it before grep.

title: Codebase RAG with Symbol-Boundary Chunking
one_liner: Chunk by AST symbol with metadata (path, kind, signature, sha); re-embed only changed-SHA chunks; expose retrieval through an MCP code_search tool.

title: Versioned Agent-Memory Files (decisions, patterns, mistakes, session)
one_liner: Persist long-term memory as four committed Markdown files; append-only with citations; only session.md may be rewritten per session.
